artifact_summary: Process flow and control logic for a cake conveying system in a wastewater dewatering facility.
artifact_blurb: This P&ID illustrates the mechanical and electrical architecture of a cake conveying subsystem within a wastewater dewatering plant. It maps the interaction between physical process equipment—specifically conveyors, drive motors, and diverters—and their corresponding control logic, PLC input signals, and field operator panel configurations.

It maps the interaction between physical process equipment—specifically conveyors, drive motors, and diverters—and their corresponding control logic, PLC input signals, and field operator panel configurations.
